phaseGoal: 把 runtime contextRecovery signal 显示到 Control Deck，让用户能在首页和阶段工作台看懂 Context Packet / Role Packet 是否 fresh、stale、missing，以及为什么要 sync / hygiene / continue。
deliverable: Compact homepage context summary plus detailed phase workbench Context 状态 section
inScope: homepage 推进判断卡片显示简洁 context 状态
阶段工作台显示 Context 状态详情
把 current packet / selected role packet / recovery action 翻译成人话
补充 context recovery gate reason 中文标签
补充前端渲染测试覆盖 fresh 与 watch/recover 状态
outOfScope: 改变首页整体视觉骨架
stopCondition: Control Deck homepage and phase workbench can clearly show context recovery status without changing the existing visual system.
verificationForThisPhase: Playwright smoke: homepage context summary and phase workbench Context 状态 are visible
